name: Kingdom of Bretonnia
sources: Warhammer: The Old World — Forces of Fantasy (2023)

rules.notes: 0-1 Duke; 0-1 Baron or Prophetess per 1,000 points; Paladins, Damsels and Sergeants-at-Arms as desired

1+ Knights of the Realm on Foot and/or Mounted Knights of the Realm; 1+ Men-at-Arms and/or Peasant Bowmen; 0-1 Knights Errant per unit of Knights of the Realm on Foot or Mounted Knights of the Realm taken
Squires, Questing Knights, Pegasus Knights and Mounted Yeomen; 0-2 units of Battle Pilgrims per 1,000 points
0-2 units of Battle Pilgrims per 1,000 points
Grail Knights; 0-1 Field Trebuchet per 1,000 points
0-1 Field Trebuchet per 1,000 points
Any Kingdom of Bretonnia Army of Infamy list; or one of: Dwarfen Mountain Holds (Suspicious), Empire of Man, High Elf Realms, Wood Elf Realms (Suspicious)

special_abilities.name: Crusading Knights
special_abilities.description: Characters and units gain Crusader's Zeal and can replace Knight's Vow with Crusader's Vow

special_abilities.name: Crusader's Zeal
special_abilities.description: Units gain +1 to max charge range and Impetuous special rule

special_abilities.name: Earn Your Spurs
special_abilities.description: Knights Errant capturing enemy standards gain 100 VP; near Grail Vow holders or Lords, they can re-roll To Hit rolls of 1

rules.notes: 0-1 Duke; 0-1 Baron or Prophetess per 1,000 points; 1+ Paladins; Damsels and Sergeants-at-Arms
1+ Knights Errant per 1,000 points; 0-1 Battle Pilgrims as Core; Knights of the Realm on Foot, Squires and Mounted Knights of the Realm
0-1 unit of Battle Pilgrims may be taken as a Core choice
1+ units of Knights Errant per 1,000 points
Men-at-Arms, Peasant Bowmen, Battle Pilgrims, Questing Knights and Pegasus Knights
Grail Knights and Mounted Yeomen; 0-1 Field Trebuchet
0-1 Field Trebuchet (absolute maximum)
Empire Knights and Inner Circle Knights only

special_abilities.name: Banished Lords
special_abilities.description: Barons and Paladins cannot have Grail Vow; can replace Knight's Vow with Exile's Vow for free

special_abilities.name: The Exile's Vow
special_abilities.description: Units gain Stubborn and Veteran; ignore panic from peasant units being destroyed nearby

special_abilities.name: Reclaimed Glory
special_abilities.description: Cannot pray for Blessings at game start, but gain it automatically when making overrun or pursuing fleeing enemies

rules.notes: 0-1 Baron per 1,000 points; 0-1 Damsel; Paladins, Outcast Wizards and Sergeants-at-Arms as desired
0-1 Baron per 1,000 points
1+ Knights of the Realm on Foot and/or Mounted Knights of the Realm; 1+ Yeoman Guard and/or Peasant Bowmen; 0-1 Knights Errant per 1,000 points; Men-at-Arms and Mounted Yeomen
0-1 units of Knights Errant per 1,000 points
Squires and Pegasus Knights; 0-1 Battle Pilgrims per 1,000 points
0-1 units of Battle Pilgrims per 1,000 points
Questing Knights and Border Princes Brigands; 0-1 Field Trebuchet per 1,000 points; 0-1 Border Princes Bombard per 1,000 points
0-1 Field Trebuchet per 1,000 points
0-1 Border Princes Bombard per 1,000 points
Free Company Militia and Empire Archers only

units.name: Duke
notes: A single Paladin in the army may be upgraded to Battle Standard Bearer at no extra cost; BSB may purchase a magic standard with no points limit

options.description: Replace Knight's Vow with the Questing Vow
Replace Knight's Vow with the Grail Vow

units.name: Paladin

options.description: Replace Knight's Vow with the Questing Vow
Replace Knight's Vow with the Grail Vow

notes: A single Paladin may be upgraded to Battle Standard Bearer at no extra cost; BSB may purchase a magic standard with no points limit

units.name: Bretonnian Warhorse
equipment: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon)
notes: Available to Duke, Baron, Paladin, Prophetess (+16 pts) and Damsel (+16 pts)

units.name: Warhorse
equipment: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon)
notes: Available to Prophetess (+12 pts), Damsel (+12 pts) and Sergeant-at-Arms (+12 pts)

units.name: Barded Pegasus
equipment: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon)
notes: Available to Duke, Baron and Paladin

units.name: Royal Pegasus
equipment: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon)
notes: Armour Bane (1) applies to Royal Pegasus only, not the rider
Available to Duke, Baron, Paladin, and Prophetess only (+60 pts)

units.name: Unicorn
equipment: Hooves and horn (counts as a hand weapon)
notes: Armour Bane (2) applies to Unicorn only, not the rider
Available to Prophetess and Damsel

units.name: Hippogryph

weapon_profiles.name: Serrated Maw
weapon_profiles.notes: In combat, this model must make one of its attacks each turn with this weapon

notes: Available to Duke and Baron only
A character mount only — its points are added to those of its rider

units.name: Knights of the Realm on Foot

options.description: Replace shields with great weapons (entire unit)
First Knight may purchase magic items

units.name: Men-at-Arms

options.description: Grail Monk may be equipped with Blessed Triptych (unit gains Stubborn)

weapon_profiles.name: Polearm (double-handed)
weapon_profiles.notes: Requires Two Hands. A polearm has two profiles. You must choose which the unit will use at the start of the first round of a combat. A model wielding a polearm cannot make a supporting attack during a turn in which it charged.

notes: A Grail Monk is a command group model that follows the rules for a champion — a unit containing both a Yeoman and a Grail Monk has two champions

options.description: Defensive stakes (unit gains defensive stakes when deployed)
Burning braziers (unit's longbows gain Flaming Attacks)
Replace Close Order with Skirmishers (entire unit)

units.name: Battle Pilgrims & Grail Reliquae

options.description: Include a Grail Reliquae (counts as standard bearer and musician; grants Immune to Psychology and Unbreakable when within 12" of a Grail Vow model)

notes: Battle Pilgrims: Close Order, Hatred (All Enemies), Levies, Peasantry, Stubborn
Grail Reliquae additionally has: Blessings of the Lady, Grail Reliquae (special rule), Retinue of the Saints
Base size of Grail Reliquae: 50 x 75 mm
Your army may include one Grail Reliquae per character or unit with the Grail Vow

units.name: Battle Pilgrims & Grail Reliquae

options.description: Include a Grail Reliquae (counts as standard bearer and musician; grants Immune to Psychology and Unbreakable when within 12" of a Grail Vow model)

notes: 0-1 may be taken as a Core choice in an Errantry Crusade army
Battle Pilgrims: Close Order, Hatred (All Enemies), Levies, Peasantry, Stubborn
Grail Reliquae additionally has: Blessings of the Lady, Grail Reliquae (special rule), Retinue of the Saints
Base size of Grail Reliquae: 50 x 75 mm
Your army may include one Grail Reliquae per character or unit with the Grail Vow

units.name: Knights Errant
equipment: Knights Errant: Hand weapons, lances, heavy armour and shields
Bretonnian Warhorse: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon) and barding

units.name: Mounted Knights of the Realm
equipment: Knights of the Realm: Hand weapons, lances, heavy armour and shields
Bretonnian Warhorse: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon) and barding

options.description: First Knight may purchase magic items

units.name: Questing Knights
equipment: Questing Knights: Hand weapons, great weapons, heavy armour and shields
Bretonnian Warhorse: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon) and barding

options.description: Paragon may take a single Knightly Virtue
options.condition: Paragon only; see Knightly Virtues list

units.name: Grail Knights
equipment: Grail Knights: Hand weapons, lances, heavy armour and shields
Bretonnian Warhorse: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon) and barding

options.description: Grail Guardian may take a single Knightly Virtue
options.condition: Grail Guardian only; see Knightly Virtues list

options.description: Grail Guardian may purchase magic items

units.name: Pegasus Knights
equipment: Pegasus Knights: Hand weapons, lances, heavy armour and shields
Barded Pegasus: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon) and barding
notes: Furious Charge applies to Pegasus Knights and First Knight models only

units.name: Mounted Yeomen
equipment: Mounted Yeoman: Hand weapons, cavalry spears and shortbows
Warhorse: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon)

weapon_profiles.name: Cavalry Spear
weapon_profiles.notes: Cavalry/monster/chariot only. S+1 and AP-1 apply only during a turn in which the wielder charged. Cannot make a supporting attack on a charge.

weapon_profiles.name: Field Trebuchet
weapon_profiles.notes: Shoots like a stone thrower using the Bombardment special rule with a 3" blast template. Multiple Wounds (D3+1) applies only to a single model whose base lies beneath the central hole of the blast template.

units.name: The Green Knight
equipment: The Green Knight: The Dolorous Blade (see weapon profiles), heavy armour and shield
The Shadow Steed: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon) and barding

weapon_profiles.name: The Dolorous Blade — Deadly blows
weapon_profiles.notes: The Dolorous Blade has two profiles. You must choose which the wielder will use at the start of each round of combat.

notes: May be included in any Kingdom of Bretonnia army using any army composition list
Must be fielded as presented — no additional options
Not placed during deployment; uses Aura of the Fay and Guardian of the Sacred Sites rules to enter play

units.name: Sir Cecil Gastonne, The Wyrm Slayer
notes: Sir Cecil Gastonne is a Baron

Dragonhide Cloak: AP of non-magical weapons attacking Sir Cecil reduced by 2; immune to Killing Blow and Multiple Wounds (X) — any such wound becomes a single wound; 3+ Ward save against wounds from Flaming Attacks
May be included in any Kingdom of Bretonnia army using any army composition list that includes Baron option
Must be fielded as presented

units.name: Lady Élisse Duchaard
equipment: Lady Élisse Duchaard: Hand weapon, Chalice of Brionne, The Staff of the Elements
Ariandir: Hooves and horn (counts as a hand weapon)
notes: Lady Élisse Duchaard is a Prophetess
Armour Bane (2) applies to Ariandir only
Chalice of Brionne: enemy characters within Command range suffer -2 Ld for special rule or magic item Leadership tests
The Staff of the Elements: may discard two randomly generated spells (instead of one) and select two signature spells from Lore of Elementalism and/or Lore of the Lady
Arcane Backlash: +1 to Dispel rolls; rolling a natural double (not double 1) unbinds the spell and the casting Wizard loses 1 Wound
May be included in any Kingdom of Bretonnia army using any army composition list that includes Prophetess option
Must be fielded as presented

options.description: Grail Monk may be equipped with Blessed Triptych (unit gains Stubborn)
Replace Open Order with Close Order (0-1 unit per 1,000 pts)
Replace Open Order with Skirmishers (0-1 unit per 1,000 pts)

weapon_profiles.name: Blunderbuss
weapon_profiles.notes: No negative modifiers for firing at long range, for using Multiple Shots (D3), or whilst making a Stand & Shoot charge reaction

weapon_profiles.name: Bombard
weapon_profiles.notes: Shoots like a cannon using the Cannon Fire special rule. Uses the Bombard Misfire table: 1=Destroyed; 2-3=Malfunction (crew loses 1 Wound, fails to shoot); 4-5=Pffft (fails to shoot); 6=Boom! (shoots as if Artillery dice rolled 2, cannot shoot next round).

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Knightly Temper
knightly_virtues.description: During a turn in which it charged, a model with this Virtue gains the Extra Attacks (+D3) and Hatred (all enemies) special rules.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Heroism
knightly_virtues.description: Unless using a magic weapon, a model with this Virtue gains the Killing Blow and Monster Slayer special rules.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Stoicism
knightly_virtues.description: A model with this Virtue (and its unit) may re-roll the 2D6 when making a Break test.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of the Penitent
knightly_virtues.description: A character with this Virtue gains the Unbreakable special rule. However, this character cannot join a friendly unit.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of the Ideal
knightly_virtues.description: A character with this Virtue has a +1 modifier to its Weapon Skill, Initiative, Attacks and Leadership characteristics. However, this character cannot be your army's General or join a friendly unit.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of the Impetuous Knight
knightly_virtues.description: A model with this Virtue gains the Impetuous special rule. In addition, this model (and its unit) increases its maximum possible charge range by 3". Finally, when this model (and its unit) makes a Charge roll, you may apply a +D3 modifier to the result.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Audacity
knightly_virtues.description: A model with this Virtue may re-roll any failed rolls To Hit made against an enemy model with a higher Weapon Skill characteristic than it.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Purity
knightly_virtues.description: A model with this Virtue always benefits from the Blessings of the Lady special rule and always has a 5+ Ward save, even if this model's army did not pray at the start of the game.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Duty
knightly_virtues.description: Unless the General of their army has been removed from play as a casualty, when calculating its combat result, this character may claim a bonus of +1 combat result point. This character cannot be your army's General or join a friendly unit.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of the Joust
knightly_virtues.description: A model with this Virtue may re-roll any failed rolls To Wound made when using a lance.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Confidence
knightly_virtues.description: A model with this Virtue must always issue and accept challenges (if possible). During a challenge, this model may re-roll any failed rolls To Hit.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Noble Disdain
knightly_virtues.description: A model with this Virtue may re-roll any failed rolls To Hit made during the first round of combat when engaged with an enemy equipped with any missile weapons.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Discipline
knightly_virtues.description: A model with this Virtue (and its unit) can march whilst within 8" of an enemy unit without first having to make a Leadership test.

knightly_virtues.name: Virtue of Empathy
knightly_virtues.description: A character with this Virtue can join a unit with the Peasantry special rule.

magic_items.name: Burning Blade*
magic_items.description:
Once unsheathed, the cutting edge of the Burning Blade writhes endlessly with a living flame.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-Flaming AttacksMagical Attacks*Extremely Common
*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Biting Blade
magic_items.description:
The serrated length of the Biting Blade cuts through armour of plate and mail with terrible ease.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-2Armour Bane (1)Magical Attacks

magic_items.name: Sword of Striking*
magic_items.description:
Engraved with runes of accuracy and swiftness, the Sword of Striking is an elegant weapon of great precision.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-Magical AttacksNotes: During the Combat phase, the wielder of the Sword of Striking has a +1 modifier to their rolls To Hit.*Extremely Common

weapon_profile.name: Sword of Striking
weapon_profile.notes: Wielder has +1 modifier to rolls To Hit during Combat phase

magic_items.name: Berserker Blade
magic_items.description:
Quenched in the blood of untold fallen enemies, the Berserker Blade eternally hungers for battle.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-Extra Attacks (+1)ImpetuousMagical AttacksNotes: The wielder of the Berserker Blade is Impetuous.
Notes: The wielder of the Berserker Blade is Impetuous.

magic_items.name: Foebreaker
magic_items.rules_text: Any enemy model that suffers one or more unsaved wounds from the Foebreaker must immediately make a Toughness test. If failed, the wounded model suffers a -1 modifier to its Weapon Skill and Attacks characteristics (to a minimum of 1) until the end of the next Combat phase.

magic_items.name: Sword of Might*
magic_items.description:
Bound around with powerful runes that increase its power and enhance the strength of its bearer.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Magical Attacks*Extremely Common
*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Sword of Swiftness
magic_items.description:
Crafted from magically attuned materials and ensorcelled to strike as if with a life of its own.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-Magical AttacksStrike First

magic_items.name: Sword of the Stout Hearted
magic_items.description: Imbued with the courage of Gilles le Breton himself, this sword fills the wielder with the fortitude to face down any enemy.

magic_items.name: Frontier Axe
magic_items.rules_text: This enchanted axe severs limbs and sunders armour in a single swing.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in a Bretonnian Exiles Army of Infamy only

magic_items.name: Giant Blade
magic_items.description:
A broad and heavy blade wrought with powerful enchantments that only increase the weight of its blows, the Giant Blade is an unsubtle weapon.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-Armour Bane (2)Magical AttacksMultiple Wounds (2)

magic_items.name: Hell-forged Axe
magic_items.description:
In the midst of battle, smoke billows and flames burst from the glowing blade of this fell weapon.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Armour Bane (3)Flaming AttacksMagical Attacks

magic_items.name: Sword of Sorrow
magic_items.description: Though it possesses no special properties when wielded in combat, it is said that a gesture with the Sword of Sorrow can pierce an enemy's heart from afar.

magic_items.name: Spelleater Axe
magic_items.description:
Forged of rune-encrusted brass, the Spelleater Axe is anathema to the Winds of Magic.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-1Magical AttacksMagic Resistance (-2)

magic_items.name: Morning Star of Fracasse
magic_items.description: Any magic weapon carried by an enemy model that suffers one or more unsaved wounds from the Morning Star of Fracasse is destroyed and cannot be used for the remainder of the game.

magic_items.name: Headsman's Axe
magic_items.description:
A wide bladed axe, steeped in the blood of its countless helpless victims.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Killing BlowMagical AttacksRequires Two Hands

magic_items.name: Dragon Slaying Sword
magic_items.description:
A mighty blade, wielded by many great heroes in their endless quests to slay foul monsters.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-Magical AttacksMonster Slayer

magic_items.name: Heartwood Lance
magic_items.description: This unbreakable lance is crafted from the heart of the Major Oak, the largest tree in Bretonnia. Can only be used in a turn in which the wielder charged; otherwise use hand weapon.
magic_items.restrictions: Models whose troop type is 'cavalry' or 'monster' only

magic_items.name: Meteor Hammer
magic_items.description:
No matter who wields this mighty hammer, their blows will land with the force of a meteor plummeting from the heavens.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-3Magical AttacksRequires Two HandsNotes: When making a roll To Wound with this weapon, a roll of a 3+ is always a success, regardless of the target's Toughness.

weapon_profile.name: Meteor Hammer
weapon_profile.notes: When making a roll To Wound with this weapon, a roll of 3+ is always a success, regardless of the target's Toughness

magic_items.name: Duellist's Blades
magic_items.description:
Fine weapons, forged by the greatest of swordsmiths and imbued with potent runes of quickening.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS-1Extra Attacks (+2)Magical AttacksRequires Two Hands

magic_items.name: Crusader's Lance
magic_items.description: The Crusader's Lance can only be used during a turn in which the wielder charged. In subsequent turns (or if the wielder did not charge), the model must use its hand weapon instead.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in an Errantry Crusade Army of Infamy whose troop type is 'cavalry' or 'monster' only

magic_items.name: Sword of Battle
magic_items.description:
A simple weapon, yet finely crafted, blessed by mighty mages and revered priests.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Armour Bane (1)Extra Attacks (+1)Magical Attacks

magic_items.name: Sword of Heroes
magic_items.rules_text: This mighty blade has powerful enchantments against evil bound into it. When making a roll To Wound for a hit caused with this sword, a roll of 5+ is always a success, regardless of the target's Toughness.

magic_items.name: Cackling Blade
magic_items.description:
Those who carry the Cackling Blade relinquish all self control until the battle has long ended - often to their peril.
RangeStrengthArmour PiercingSpecial RulesCombatS+1-1Extra Attacks (+D6)Magical AttacksNotes: If a natural 6 is rolled for the Extra Attacks (+D6) special rule, the wielder of the Cackling Blade immediately loses a single Wound.

weapon_profile.name: Cackling Blade
weapon_profile.notes: If a natural 6 is rolled for the Extra Attacks (+D6) special rule, the wielder immediately loses a single Wound

magic_items.name: Sword of the Quest
magic_items.description: This large hand-and-a-half sword has been passed down from knight to knight, aiding generations of heroes on their noble quests.

weapon_profile.name: Sword of the Quest
weapon_profile.notes: Two profiles: Single-handed (S+1, AP-1, Magical Attacks, Strike First) or Double-handed (S+2, AP-2, Magical Attacks, Multiple Wounds (2), Requires Two Hands, Strike Last). Choose at start of each round of combat.

magic_items.name: Ogre Blade
magic_items.description: A massive sword of terrible power, forged in the darkest mountains of the Old World.

magic_items.name: Charmed Shield*
magic_items.description: A simple shield hung with charms and fetishes to bring the bearer good fortune. In the heat of battle, such ornamentation rarely survives intact for long.

magic_items.name: Enchanted Shield*
magic_items.description:
A finely crafted and sturdy shield that protects its bearer from harm time and time again.
The Enchanted Shield is a shield. In addition, its bearer has a 6+ Ward save against any wounds suffered that were caused by a non-magical enemy attack.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Armour of Meteoric Iron
magic_items.rules_text:
This heavy armour was forged of ore mined from a meteor that fell from the heavens.
The Armour of Meteoric Iron gives its wearer an armour value of 5+, which cannot be improved in any way. However, nor can this armour value be reduced in any way either.

magic_items.name: Trailblazer's Hauberk
magic_items.description: The local flora seems to shift and bend to allow the wearer to pass unimpeded through even the thickest briar.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is infantry only. The Trailblazer's Hauberk is a suit of heavy armour. In addition, its wearer gains the Move Through Cover and Scouts special rules.

magic_items.name: Levitating Shield
magic_items.description: Born aloft by a cunning enchantment, this shield seems to place itself between its owner and the weapons of the enemy.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is infantry only. The Levitating Shield is a shield. In addition, the bearer may use it alongside a weapon with the Requires Two Hands special rule during combat.

magic_items.name: Spellshield*
magic_items.description:
The Winds of Magic lose their power when in the presence of the brass-bound Spellshield.
The Spellshield is a shield. In addition, its bearer has a 5+ Ward save against any wounds suffered that were caused by a Magic Missile, a Magical Vortex, or an Assailment spell.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Shield of the Warrior True
magic_items.description:
A heavy shield of oak and iron that turns aside all but the most deadly of missiles.
The Shield of the Warrior True is a shield. In addition, its bearer has a 5+ Ward save against any wounds suffered during the Shooting phase.

magic_items.name: Glittering Scales
magic_items.description:
Each and every scale of this armoured surcoat is crafted from shards of precious metal.
The Glittering Scales is a suit of light armour. In addition, once per turn, you may make your opponent re-roll a single roll To Hit made against the wearer.

magic_items.name: Armour of Silvered Steel
magic_items.description:
Polished to a mirror shine, the Armour of Silvered Steel encases its wearer from head to toe.
The Armour of Silvered Steel is a suit of armour that gives its wearer an armour value of 3+ which cannot be improved in any way.

magic_items.name: Gromril Great Helm
magic_items.rules_text: May be worn with other armour. Improves the wearer's armour value by 1 (to a maximum of 2+). In addition, the wearer may re-roll any roll of a natural 1 made when making an Armour Save roll.

magic_items.name: Bedazzling Helm
magic_items.description: A gleaming helm that confuses and confounds enemies, causing their blows to fall wide of their mark.

magic_items.name: Gilded Cuirass
magic_items.description: Inscribed with the words of the Grail Vow. A suit of heavy armour. In addition, its wearer has the Regeneration (5+) special rule.

magic_items.name: Armour of Destiny
magic_items.description: A suit of magical armour forged at the confluence of two ley lines, the Armour of Destiny protects its wearer from harm beyond mortal ken.
magic_items.restrictions: May only be worn by a model that is equipped with (or has the option to be equipped with) armour.

magic_items.name: Luckstone*
magic_items.description: Can luck be trapped within a dull stone pendant? Possibly.
magic_items.rules_text:
Single use. The bearer of a Luckstone can re-roll a single failed Armour Save roll.*Extremely Common
Single use. The bearer of a Luckstone can re-roll a single failed Armour Save roll. *Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Obsidian Lodestone*
magic_items.description: An air of chill hangs about obsidian, stilling the Winds of Magic in its presence.
magic_items.rules_text: A model may purchase up to three Obsidian Lodestones. A model that bears a single Obsidian Lodestone has Magic Resistance (-1), a model that bears two has Magic Resistance (-2), and a model that bears three has Magic Resistance (-3).*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Mantle of the Damsel Elena
magic_items.rules_text: The bearer is immune to the Poisoned Attacks special rule. If the bearer is wounded by an attack with this special rule, the attacker must roll To Wound as normal.

magic_items.name: Paymaster's Coin*
magic_items.description: This heavy golden coin may not be enchanted, but its weight in its owner's pocket certainly inspires heroism.
magic_items.rules_text:
Single use. The bearer of a Paymaster's Coin can re-roll any failed rolls To Hit made during the Combat phase.*Extremely Common
Single use. The bearer of a Paymaster's Coin can re-roll any failed rolls To Hit made during the Combat phase. *Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Sirienne's Locket
magic_items.rules_text: The bearer is immune to the Multiple Wounds (X) special rule. If the bearer is wounded by an attack with this special rule, they suffer a single wound.
magic_items.restrictions: Models whose troop type is 'infantry' or 'cavalry' only

magic_items.name: Ironhide Talisman
magic_items.description: It is said that the one who bears this powerful heirloom can endure even the most telling blows.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is infantry only. Any enemy model that makes a successful roll To Hit against the bearer of the Ironhide Talisman during the Shooting phase or Combat phase must re-roll any rolls To Wound of a natural 6. Note that this magic item does not work against attacks that hit automatically.

magic_items.name: Talisman of Protection
magic_items.description:
A powerful magical aura surrounds this humble talisman, protecting its wearer from harm.
The Talisman of Protection gives its bearer a 5+ Ward save against any wounds suffered.

magic_items.name: Dawnstone
magic_items.description: Talismans are tokens of magical protection, worn by warriors to protect them from harm both physical and magical. The magic trapped within this semi-precious stone binds together shattered armour plates.
magic_items.rules_text: The bearer of the Dawnstone may re-roll any Armour Save roll of a natural 1.

magic_items.name: Icon of Fortitude
magic_items.description: Carefully woven with protective enchantments, this exquisite brooch is said to shield its bearer from the deadliest blows.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is infantry or cavalry only. The bearer is immune to the Multiple Wounds (X) special rule. If the bearer is wounded by an attack with this special rule, they suffer a single wound.

magic_items.name: Gauntlet of the Duel
magic_items.description: Challenges issued by the bearer of a Gauntlet of the Duel cannot be refused.
magic_items.rules_text: During a challenge, this model may re-roll any failed rolls To Hit.

magic_items.name: Potion of Foolhardiness*
magic_items.description: A magical brew that fills the drinker with courage… it may actually just be strong liquor.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Potion of Foolhardiness can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model gains the Immune To Psychology special rule.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Potion of Speed*
magic_items.description: A powerful potion with a terrible aftertaste that sharpens the wits and speeds the reactions.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Potion of Speed can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model has a +D3 modifier to its Initiative characteristic (to a maximum of 10).*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Becalming Orb
magic_items.description: This pulsing crystal orb can syphon the Winds of Magic away from its bearer's enemies.
magic_items.rules_text: Single Use. The bearer of the Becalming Orb may cast the following Bound spell, with a Power level of 1:TypeHexCasting Value8+RangeSelfUntil your next Start of Turn sub-phase, enemy Wizards that are within 15" of the caster when attempting to cast a spell must increase that spell's casting value by 2.

magic_items.name: Potion of Toughness*
magic_items.description: Distilled by magical means, this potion is sure to make the drinker all but invulnerable.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Potion of Toughness can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model has a +D3 modifier to its Toughness characteristic (to a maximum of 10).*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Antlers of the Great Hunt
magic_items.description: If the wearer of the Antlers of the Great Hunt is mounted on a Barded Warhorse or a Warhorse, they and any unit they join gains the Move through Cover special rule.

magic_items.name: Potion of Strength*
magic_items.description: A concoction of strength-giving vegetables and roots, mixed together with a touch of magic.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Potion of Strength can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model has a +D3 modifier to its Strength characteristic (to a maximum of 10).*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Potion of Fervour
magic_items.description: This noxious brew allows those who risk drinking it a moment of godliness upon the battlefield.
magic_items.rules_text: Single Use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of the Potion of Fervour can consume it. Until the end of that turn, the model has a +D3 modifier to its Attacks characteristic (to a maximum of 10). Note that a model can only consume a single potion (of any type) per Command phase.

magic_items.name: Healing Potion*
magic_items.description: Purveyors of magical potions make many bold claims. Sometimes they are true, sometimes not.
magic_items.rules_text:
Single use. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, the bearer of a Healing Potion can consume it. The model immediately recovers D3 lost Wounds.*Extremely Common
Single use. The model immediately recovers D3 lost Wounds.

magic_items.name: Ruby Ring of Ruin
magic_items.description: Uttering a simple command, the wearer of the ring can hurl a flaming ball of ruin at their foes.
magic_items.rules_text: The wielder of the Ruby Ring of Ruin can cast the Fireball spell from the Lore of Battle Magic as a Bound spell, with a Power Level of 1.

magic_items.name: Arch-Lightning Rod
magic_items.description: Crackling lightning fills the heavens with peril, grounding the creatures of the sky.

magic_items.name: Falcon-horn of Fredemund
magic_items.rules_text: During the Command sub-phase of their turn, if not engaged in combat, this character may make a Leadership test (using their own unmodified Leadership). If passed, until your next Start of Turn sub-phase, enemy units cannot use the Fly (X) special rule.

magic_items.name: Flying Carpet
magic_items.description: Woven from the finest silks in a far-off land, this splendid rug does more than warm the feet!
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is regular infantry or heavy infantry only. The bearer of the Flying Carpet gains the Fly (8) and Swiftstride special rules. However, the bearer cannot join a unit.

magic_items.name: Wizarding Hat
magic_items.description: This splendid hat, once the property of a long dead Wizard, is still haunted by their ghost.

magic_items.name: Earthing Rod
magic_items.description: Inert metal runs the length of the Wizard's staff, drawing magical overloads safely into the earth.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. Should they miscast a spell, a Wizard can use the Earthing Rod to re-roll the result rolled on the Miscast table.

magic_items.name: Arcane Familiar
magic_items.description: Many Wizards are accompanied by familiars gifted with arcane knowledge. These creatures constantly whisper secrets to their master.

magic_items.name: Dispel Scroll*
magic_items.description: The Wizard reads aloud a charm of unbinding from an enchanted scroll.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. A Wizard may use this scroll when attempting a Wizardly dispel. If they do so, roll an extra D6 when making the Dispel roll and discard the lowest result. However, if a double 1 is rolled on any two of the dice rolled, the Wizard is outclassed in the art.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Power Scroll*
magic_items.description: Unfurling a scroll bearing runes of power can greatly increase the spell's power.
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. A Wizard may use this scroll when attempting to cast a spell. If they do so, roll an extra D6 when making the Casting roll and discard the lowest result. However, if a double 1 is rolled on any two of the dice rolled, the spell is miscast.*Extremely Common

magic_items.name: Prayer Icon of Quenelles
magic_items.rules_text: The bearer of the Prayer Icon of Quenelles increases their Dispel range by 3". Additionally, when attempting to dispel a Hex spell, the bearer gains a +1 modifier to their Dispel roll.

magic_items.name: Lore Familiar
magic_items.description:
By creating a magical homunculus, a Wizard is able to better recall forgotten details of their studies.
The owner of a Lore Familiar does not randomly generate their spells. Instead, they may choose which spells they know from their chosen lore (including that lore's signature spell).

magic_items.name: Sacrament of the Lady
magic_items.description: Before making a Casting roll, the bearer may apply a +2 modifier to that Casting roll.
magic_items.rules_text: Note that this modifier does not negate a roll of a natural double 1.

magic_items.name: Scroll of Disruption
magic_items.description: When spoken aloud, the words upon this ancient scroll cause the Winds of Magic to bluster and the spells of the enemy to unravel.
magic_items.rules_text: Once per turn, the bearer of the Scroll of Disruption may re-roll a Dispel roll.*Note all dice are re-rolled, including any bonus or discard dice granted by special rules or magic items.

magic_items.name: Tome of Spellcraft
magic_items.description: Reading aloud from a dusty tome of great age, the Wizard enunciates their spells with unrivalled clarity and precision.
magic_items.rules_text: Once per turn, the bearer of the Tome of Spellcraft may re-roll a Casting roll.*Note all dice are re-rolled, including any bonus or discard dice granted by special rules or magic items.

magic_items.name: Silver Mirror
magic_items.rules_text: Single use. When making a Wizardly dispel, the bearer may use the Silver Mirror. Roll an extra D6 and discard the lowest result. If a 1 is rolled on any two of the dice, the bearer is outclassed, the dispel attempt fails, and the casting Wizard suffers a Strength 4 hit with AP -2.

magic_items.name: Staff of Quietude
magic_items.description: With a gesture, the bearer of the Staff of Quietude calms the Winds of Magic, causing spells and conjurations to dissipate into the other.

magic_items.name: Wand of Jet
magic_items.description: Carved from brittle jet, this wand refines a Wizard's power, but is easily broken.

magic_items.name: Scroll of Transmogrification*
magic_items.description: For a Wizard, there are few things better than the rush of joy felt upon turning a rival into a frog!

magic_items.name: Feedback Scroll
magic_items.description: When read aloud, this charm causes ætheric energy to flood back towards the enemy Wizard.

magic_items.name: Banner of Châlons
magic_items.description: Enemy units cannot declare a Stand & Shoot charge reaction against a unit carrying the Banner of Châlons.

magic_items.name: Monster Hunter's Tapestry
magic_items.description:
Those who have earned the right to fight under this standard have battled some of the Old World's most dangerous beasts and lived to tell the tale.
Enemy units may not make Stomp Attacks against a unit carrying the Monster Hunter's Tapestry.

magic_items.name: The Blazing Banner
magic_items.description: An eternal flame flickers about the weapons of those that march beneath the Blazing Banner.
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Blazing Banner gains the Flaming Attacks special rule.

magic_items.name: War Banner
magic_items.description:
A proud banner of great age. Those that march beneath the War Banner fight with grim resolve.
When calculating its combat result, a unit carrying the War Banner may claim an additional bonus of +1 combat result point.

magic_items.name: Banner of Swirling Wind
magic_items.description: Gale-force winds surge around this standard so fiercely that arrows and shot are blown forcefully away from their target.
magic_items.rules_text: Any enemy model that shoots at a unit carrying the Banner of Swirling Wind suffers an additional -1 To Hit modifier.

magic_items.name: Errantry Banner
magic_items.description: All models in a unit carrying the Errantry Banner have a +1 modifier to their Strength characteristic during a turn in which they charge. However, the unit also gains the Impetuous special rule.

magic_items.name: Rampaging Banner
magic_items.description:
As a matter of honour, those that fight beneath the Rampaging Banner are always first into the fray.
When a unit carrying the Rampaging Banner declares a charge, it may re-roll its Charge roll.

magic_items.name: Conqueror's Tapestry
magic_items.rules_text: Any enemy standard captured by a unit carrying the Conqueror's Tapestry is worth 100 Victory Points as a trophy of war.

magic_items.name: Razor Standard
magic_items.description: Hung with hundreds of wickedly sharp blades, an air of sharpness radiates outwards from the Razor Standard.
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Razor Standard gains the Armour Bane (2) special rule.

magic_items.name: Banner of Iron Resolve
magic_items.description: No regiment that stands beneath the Banner of Iron Resolve has ever fled from the foe.
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Banner of Iron Resolve gains the Stubborn special rule.

magic_items.name: Banner of the Steadfast
magic_items.description: Woven into the bright fabric of this banner is a scene of unimaginable gallantry, a scene that serves to inspire those who fight in its shadow to hold their ground no matter the odds.

magic_items.name: Totem of Wrath
magic_items.description: Cruel runes etched into the surface of this icon tremble with power, causing those around it to succumb to an animalistic ferocity.
magic_items.rules_text: During a turn in which it charged, models within a unit carrying the Totem of Wrath improve the Armour Piercing characteristic of their weapons by 1, and may re-roll any rolls To Wound of a natural 1.

magic_items.name: Valorous Standard
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Valorous Standard rolls 3D6 when making a Break test and discards the highest result.

magic_items.name: Seal of Parravon
magic_items.description: Bearer always hits on a 3+ regardless of Weapon Skill.

magic_items.name: Anointed Armour
magic_items.description: Counts as heavy armour. Whilst the bearer is blessed by the Lady, they are immune to the Killing Blow and Multiple Wounds special rules.
magic_items.restrictions: Models with the Grail Vow whose troop type is 'infantry' or 'cavalry' only

magic_items.name: Ironspike Shield
magic_items.description: Counts as a shield. Any attacker who rolls a natural 1 to hit the bearer in close combat suffers a Strength 3 hit with AP -1 in return.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in a Bretonnian Exiles Army of Infamy only

magic_items.name: Grail Pendant
magic_items.description: Single use. When the bearer would lose their last wound, roll a D6; on a 2+ the wound is not lost.
magic_items.restrictions: Models with the Grail Vow only

magic_items.name: Lucky Heirloom
magic_items.description: Once per round, the bearer may re-roll one failed To Hit, To Wound, Armour Save or Ward Save roll.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in a Bretonnian Exiles Army of Infamy only

magic_items.name: Crusader's Clarion
magic_items.description: On the turn the bearer charges, the bearer's mount and all friendly mounts in the same unit gain +1 Strength until end of phase.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in an Errantry Crusade Army of Infamy mounted on a Bretonnian Warhorse only

magic_items.name: Wyrmbrath Vial
magic_items.description: Single use. Breath weapon: Strength 4, AP -1, Flaming Attacks, Magical Attacks.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in a Bretonnian Exiles Army of Infamy only

magic_items.name: Heart of the Wilds
magic_items.description: The wizard gains +1 to all Casting rolls whilst within or in base contact with a natural terrain feature.

magic_items.name: Diadem of Power
magic_items.description: The wizard gains +1 to Casting rolls when casting Magic Vortex, Magic Missile or Assailment spells.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in an Errantry Crusade Army of Infamy. Wizard only

magic_items.name: Flamestrike Wand
magic_items.description: Single use bound spell (Power Level 3): Fireball.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in a Bretonnian Exiles Army of Infamy. Wizard only

magic_items.name: Banner of the Lady's Grace
magic_items.description: The unit bearing this standard ignores all negative Leadership modifiers.

magic_items.name: Crusader's Tapestry
magic_items.description: The unit bearing this standard gains the Frenzy special rule.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in an Errantry Crusade Army of Infamy only

magic_items.name: Banner of the Zealous Knight
magic_items.description: The unit bearing this standard gains the Vanguard special rule.
magic_items.restrictions: Models in a Bretonnian Exiles Army of Infamy only

magic_items.name: Banner of Honourable Warfare
magic_items.description: The unit bearing this standard must re-roll any failed To Hit rolls in the first round of close combat against an enemy unit that contains any models with missile weapons.

lore_of_the_lady.name: The Lady's Gift
lore_of_the_lady.effect: Remains in Play. Cast on 7+: target friendly unit gains Regeneration (6+). Cast on 10+: target gains Regeneration (5+). This spell may target a friendly unit engaged in combat.

lore_of_the_lady.name: The Lady's Wrath
lore_of_the_lady.effect: Remains in Play. Whilst this spell is in play, the caster, their mount and any unit they have joined gain a +1 modifier to their Strength characteristic (to a maximum of 10), and improve the Armour Piercing characteristic of their weapons by 1.

lore_of_the_lady.name: Burning Gaze
lore_of_the_lady.effect: Draw a straight line, 5D6" in length, from the caster's base edge. Any enemy model whose base falls under this line suffers a single Strength 4 hit with no armour save permitted (Ward and Regeneration saves may be attempted as normal).

chivalrous_vows.name: The Knight's Vow
chivalrous_vows.restrictions: A unit with this Vow cannot be joined by a character with the Peasantry rule. A character with this Vow cannot join a unit with the Peasantry rule.
chivalrous_vows.description: A model with this Chivalrous Vow does not have to make a Panic test when a friendly unit with the Peasantry rule is destroyed whilst within 6" of it, or when it is fled through by a friendly unit with the Peasantry rule.

chivalrous_vows.name: The Questing Vow
chivalrous_vows.restrictions: A unit with this Vow cannot be joined by a character with the Knight's Vow or the Peasantry rule. A character with this Vow cannot join a unit with the Peasantry rule.
chivalrous_vows.description: A model with this Chivalrous Vow has the Stubborn special rule and can re-roll any failed Fear, Panic or Terror test. It does not have to make a Panic test when a Peasantry unit is destroyed within 6" or fled through. A model with this Vow cannot be equipped with a lance (magical or mundane).

chivalrous_vows.name: The Grail Vow
chivalrous_vows.restrictions: A unit with this Vow can only be joined by a character with the Grail Vow or a Handmaiden of the Lady. A character with this Vow cannot join a unit with the Peasantry rule.
chivalrous_vows.description: A model with this Chivalrous Vow has the Immune to Psychology, Magical Attacks and Stubborn special rules. Models with this Vow always benefit from the Blessings of the Lady and do not have to pray at the start of the game. A model with this Vow cannot refuse a challenge.

chivalrous_vows.name: The Crusader's Vow
chivalrous_vows.restrictions: A unit with this Vow cannot be joined by a character with the Peasantry rule. A character with this Vow cannot join a unit with the Peasantry rule. Available in Errantry Crusade armies only.
chivalrous_vows.description: A Chivalrous Vow available in Errantry Crusade armies (replaces Knight's Vow at no cost). A model with this Vow has the Veteran special rule and does not have to make a Panic test when a friendly Peasantry unit is destroyed within 6" or fled through.
